sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n455" key="a)genhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγεν-ησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n455.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uncreatedness</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ κόσμου</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:139:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">139.24</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
